related_processes.CommandLine:
"C:\Users\aquae\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps\pwsh.exe" -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8;
$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'
# Stop the mis-invoked dev server from the first probe (it passed --host through npm incorrectly and Vite used 5173).
$state = if(Test-Path .codex-godmode/state/dev-server.json){ Get-Content .codex-godmode/state/dev-server.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }
$pidsToStop = @()
if($state -and $state.npm_process_id){ $pidsToStop += [int]$state.npm_process_id }
$pidsToStop += @(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'npm.cmd\" run dev:web|npm-cli.js\" run dev:web|vite(\.js)?\"?\s+127\.0\.0\.1|vite 127\.0\.0\.1' } | ForEach-Object { $_.ProcessId })
$pidsToStop = $pidsToStop | Sort-Object -Unique
foreach($id in $pidsToStop){ try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host \"Stopped dev probe PID $id\" } catch { Write-Host \"PID $id not stopped: $($_.Exception.Message)\" } }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
$repo=(Resolve-Path '.').Path
$logDir=Join-Path $repo '.codex-godmode/logs'
$out=Join-Path $logDir 'app-dev-server-phase2.out.log'
$err=Join-Path $logDir 'app-dev-server-phase2.err.log'
Remove-Item -LiteralPath $out,$err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$p=Start-Process -FilePath 'npm.cmd' -ArgumentList @('run','dev:web') -WorkingDirectory $repo -RedirectStandardOutput $out -RedirectStandardError $err -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru
Start-Sleep -Seconds 4
$stdout=Get-Content -LiteralPath $out -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$stderr=Get-Content -LiteralPath $err -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$listeners=Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5176,5173,5174,5175,5177 } | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess,State
$related=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'dev:web|@learning/web|vite' } | Select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,CommandLine
$url=$null
if($listeners | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 5176 }){ $url='http://127.0.0.1:5176/' }
elseif($stdout -match 'http://localhost:(\d+)/'){ $url=\"http://127.0.0.1:$($Matches[1])/\" }
$detectedPort=$null
if($url -match ':(\d+)/'){ $detectedPort=[int]$Matches[1] }
$status=if($url){'listening'}else{'not_listening'}
$state=[ordered]@{
  schema_version=1
  updated_at=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
  command='npm run dev:web'
  working_directory=$repo
  npm_process_id=$p.Id
  listener_processes=@($listeners)
  related_processes=@($related)
  expected_port=5176
  detected_port=$detectedPort
  url=$url
  stdout_log=$out
  stderr_log=$err
  startup_stdout_tail=($stdout -split \"`r?`n\" | Select-Object -Last 60)
  startup_stderr_tail=($stderr -split \"`r?`n\" | Select-Object -Last 60)
  status=$status
  errors=if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($stderr)){@()}else{@($stderr)}
}
$state | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $repo '.codex-godmode/state/dev-server.json') -Encoding utf8
Write-Host \"NPM_PID=$($p.Id)\"
Write-Host \"STATUS=$status\"
Write-Host \"URL=$url\"
Write-Host '--- listeners ---'; $listeners | Format-Table -AutoSize
Write-Host '--- stdout ---'; $stdout
Write-Host '--- stderr ---'; $stderr
if(-not $url){ exit 1 }
"
